title: Skillet Chicken With Tomatoes, Pancetta and Mozzarella
author: Melissa Clark

ingredients.item: bone-in chicken pieces (or a whole chicken cut into pieces)
basil, plus more chopped basil for serving
bocconcini, halved (or mozzarella cut into pieces)

steps.text: Heat oven to 400°F. Pat chicken dry and season with salt and pepper.
In a large ovenproof skillet, warm oil over medium-high heat. Add pancetta and cook until browned. Transfer pancetta to a plate.
Add chicken to the skillet and sear until browned on all sides. Transfer chicken to a plate. Pour off all but about 1 tablespoon fat.
Add garlic, anchovy and red pepper flakes; cook briefly. Stir in tomatoes and basil and cook until the sauce thickens.
Return chicken to skillet and transfer to the oven. Bake uncovered until chicken is cooked through.
Scatter bocconcini/mozzarella over the top. Broil briefly until melted and bubbling. Garnish with pancetta and basil.
